T050.description: Per-run anam counter — anamThisRun added to RunState
details: buildDefaultRun(): anamThisRun: 0 (resets automatically on startRun() via buildDefaultRun())
addAnam(amount): now updates both run.anamThisRun and meta.anam in one immutable set()
RunSummary.ts: addStat grid now shows 'Anam cette quete' (run.anamThisRun) + 'Anam total' (meta.anam) as separate cells — 5 stats total in grid

T049.description: Ogham unlock at faction rep=50 threshold crossing
details: addReputation() in Store.ts: detects threshold crossing (current<50 AND newVal>=50)
Faction->Ogham map: druides->coll, anciens->ailm, korrigans->onn, niamh->saille, ankou->eadhadh
On unlock: adds to meta.oghamsUnlocked + meta.oghamsEquipped (immutable spread)
Fires CustomEvent 'ogham_unlocked' on window with {oghamId, oghamName} — decoupled from UI
main.ts: showOghamUnlockToast() renders toast at top:80px for 3s, fade in/out 350ms, rune prefix symbol, z-index:65
FACTION_THRESHOLD_CONTENT added to Store.ts imports from Constants
